name: Almond-Coconut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. In a medium bowl, mix together flour, baking soda, and salt with a wire whisk. Set aside.
3. In another medium bowl, combine brown sugar and white sugar using an electric mixer at medium speed.
4. Add butter and mix until it forms a grainy paste.
5. Add eggs and vanilla extract, then beat until smooth.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture to the sugar mixture, alternating with the coconut, almonds, and dates. Blend on low speed until just combined; do not overmix.
7. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased baking sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
8. Sprinkle tops lightly with reserved coconut.
9. Bake for 25 minutes or until bottoms turn golden brown.
